nasb.text: The king stood up and the governor and Bernice, and those who were sitting with them,

esv.text: Then the king rose, and the governor and Bernice and those who were sitting with them.

cnv.text: 亞基帕王、總督和百尼基，還有在座的人都站起來，

ccb.text: 亚基帕王、总督、百妮姬及其他在座的人都站起来，

csbs.text: 于是王和总督，还有百妮基以及与他们坐在一起的人，都站起来了。
